message:
feat(tui): add Tab/search control hints to Board footer and test for hint visibility

Board mode footer now advertises "Tab focus" and "/ search" controls alongside
the existing grouping/empty-lanes/lane navigation hints. These were available
via keybindings but not discoverable in the footer.

New test board_footer_advertises_focus_and_search_controls verifies both
hints appear in the rendered footer at 240-column width.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
